---
title: "Places I've paddled"
freeze: false
page-layout: full
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
processed_paddles <- readRDS("data/processed_paddles.rds")

paddle_geom <-
  processed_paddles |>
    dplyr::mutate(filename = stringr::str_replace(filename, "\\.md", "\\.html")) |># TODO: Not DRY
    dplyr::select(id, name, start_date, distance, filename, geometry) |>
    sf::st_as_sf() |>
    sf::st_set_crs(4326) 

paddle_geom |>
  dplyr::mutate(label = glue::glue(
      "<span style='font-size:16px'>
         <b>{name}</b><br>
         Date: {lubridate::date(start_date)}<br>
         Distance: {round(distance, 1)}k
       </span>"
    )) |>
  dplyr::mutate(label = purrr::map(label, htmltools::HTML)) |>
  leaflet::leaflet(width = "100%", height = 700) |>
  leaflet::addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Voyager") |>
  leaflet::addPolylines(
    weight = 5,
    color = "purple",
    opacity = 1,
    label = ~label,
    layerId = ~filename, 
     highlightOptions = leaflet::highlightOptions(
      color = "orange",
      weight = 8,
      opacity = 1,
      bringToFront = TRUE
  )) |>
  leaflet::setView(-3, 56, zoom = 7) |>
  leaflet.extras::addFullscreenControl() |>
    htmlwidgets::onRender("
    function(el, x) {
      this.eachLayer(function(layer) {
        if (layer.on) {
          layer.on('click', function(e) {
            var url = e.target.options.layerId;
            if (url) { window.location.href = url; }
          });
        }
      });
    }
  ")
```
